steps.summary: Compressed older ROADMAP closed horizons to BACKLOG, opened docs/horizons/field-feedback-capture.md, docs/plans/2026-07-05-field-feedback-capture.md, and phases/field-feedback-capture with FC1~FC4. ROADMAP/OBJECTIVE were moved to active field-feedback-capture.

Added kifrs/feedback/capture.py and tests/test_field_feedback_capture.py. The capture contract validates public-safe feedback notes, rejects protected payloads, and converts safe captured corrections into feedback queue records. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_field_feedback_capture.py -q -> 5 passed with existing pytest cache warning.

Added scripts/field_feedback_capture.py and generated docs/reports/field-feedback-capture/. The package includes sample notes, capture report, feedback queue JSONL/report, and a manifest that marks actual_feedback_evidence false.

Closed field-feedback-capture with docs/reports/2026-07-05-fc4-field-feedback-capture-close-report.md. Focused tests passed 12, sample capture package regenerated, quality_preflight ok/public_safe True, and git diff --check produced only LF->CRLF warnings.
